name: Local User Creation
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Patrick Bareiss
SIGMA Title: Local User Creation
SIGMA Description: Detects local user creation on Windows servers, which shouldn't happen in an Active Directory environment. Apply this Sigma Use Case on your Windows server logs and not on your DC logs.


False positives:
- Domain Controller Logs
- Local accounts managed by privileged account management tools

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4720 AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Local User Creation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4720 AQL filter query
